name: Palomar Holdings, Inc.
summary: Who We Are We are a specialty insurance company that provides property and casualty insurance products to individuals and businesses. We leverage underwriting expertise and data-driven analytics to offer innovative solutions in five product categories: Earthquake, Casualty, Inland Marine and Other Property, Crop, and Fronting. We offer coverage in both the admitted and excess and surplus lines (E&S) markets, utilizing proprietary data analytics and a technology-enabled platform to support custom...
